hooks.name: litestar-session-start
hooks.command: r="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; [ -n "$r" ] || r="$(ls -d "$HOME"/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/litestar "$HOME"/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/*/plugins/litestar 2>/dev/null | head -n1)"; r="${r:-.}"; CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT="${r%/}" bash "${r%/}/hooks/session-start.sh"
hooks.description: Inject project-aware Litestar skill reminders into the session context.
